src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the import path for LiquibaseProperties to match the new package structure in Spring Boot 3.x.
Replace deprecated single marker access with the new marker list API introduced in newer SLF4J versions.
Update import statements to reflect package relocations in newer Spring Boot versions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed `org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.cache.JCacheManagerCustomizer` to `org.springframework.boot.cache.autoconfigure.JCacheManagerCustomizer` and similar for Hibernate.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Spring Boot import statements to reflect package restructuring in newer Spring Boot versions.
Convert List contexts to comma-delimited string to match Liquibase API requirements.
Convert List label filters to comma-delimited string to match Liquibase API requirements.
Replace deprecated acceptsProfiles with matchesProfiles for environment profile checking.
Replace com.fasterxml.jackson imports with tools.jackson to align with the new Jackson distribution used in the target framework version.
Change the thrown exception type from JsonProcessingException to JacksonException to match the new Jackson API.
